professions.label: Military
professions.summary: Trained for violence, used to orders, carrying old ghosts.

professions.label: High School Student
professions.summary: Fast, overlooked, and better at reading a room than adults expect.

professions.label: Nurse
professions.summary: Steady hands and a stubborn refusal to let people die alone.

professions.label: Doctor
professions.summary: Clinical under pressure, exhausted before the world even ended.

professions.label: Police Officer
professions.summary: A badge still opens doors, though not always the right ones.

professions.label: Mechanic
professions.summary: Can make dead engines cough back to life with wire and profanity.

professions.label: Teacher
professions.summary: Knows how to calm panic, ration supplies, and improvise with nothing.

professions.label: Athlete
professions.summary: Built to move, built to endure, still learning when not to run.

professions.label: Unemployed
professions.summary: No title, no uniform, no one waiting for you to clock in.

professions.label: Chef
professions.summary: Sharp knives, sharper timing, and an eye for edible miracles.

professions.label: Engineer
professions.summary: Sees systems, weak points, and the terrible math of collapse.
